]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring vehicle state metrics such as speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDARDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR

    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDARDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraRGBDData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB-D imaging data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

    base:desc "Vehicle state metrics including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted

]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component for point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tracks detected objects using Kalman filter"

]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC system logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for ROS2 communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for algorithm development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and algorithm development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks via user interface, along with data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation control from vehicle ECUs to DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedComputationAction, ActuationControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling operators to remotely enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and send emergency braking commands; developers use for troubleshooting via data collection and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data visualization"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks with confidence measures for recommendations"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Lead vehicle detection for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Speed computation based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control of vehicle speed and braking via ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote setting of desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed into motor voltage commands for precise speed regulation"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Direct control of vehicle's braking system for collision avoidance"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handling data pre-processing, actuation, device communication, and general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Managing data management and control mechanisms"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Comprising 3D Visualization and Control Panel components"
]

instance AutomotiveSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Controlling FE processes specific commands including enabling and disabling ACC, modifying desired speed, and performing emergency braking. These commands are serialized and translated by the Data Translation component, transmitted over ROS2 and Wi-Fi (UDP) networks to the Actuation FE for motor and steering control. Command validation and feedback mechanisms ensure accurate execution and system safety."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications to enable computation offloading, as mandated by standards and constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each FE is a ROS2 node or group of nodes, deployed across separate hardware components for Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities. System-wide coordination is achieved through ROS2 communication, with clock synchronization maintained at 100 ms accuracy for vehicular safety requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is applied across the automotive product lifecycle, specifically during the design phase of automotive systems for simulation and validation, during vehicle operation for real-time monitoring and diagnostics, and as a product lifecycle management tool integrating data from development through end-of-life."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The system maintains real-time, high-fidelity computational reflections with network latency constrained to ≤100 ms. Clock synchronization mechanisms are enforced to ensure data integrity across all components, with validation processes monitoring system performance against fidelity thresholds."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs over a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Network latency is maintained at a maximum of 100 ms as required by system specifications."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliant with ISO 23247:2021 standard, Part 2 (Reference Architecture), defining entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) may implement interoperability using protocols such as OPC Unified Architecture."
]
